# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` and the changed workspace artifacts. The patch modifies only `.ralph-burning/projects/0d1-1/run.json` and `.ralph-burning/projects/0d1-1/journal.ndjson`, both of which are runtime state/log artifacts. No implementation source files were changed in this diff, and the edited fields match the existing `RunSnapshot`/`StageResolutionSnapshot` schema usage. No correctness, safety, or robustness defects were identified in the changed lines.

## Amendments

None.
